schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The Government of Tamil Nadu introduced "Marriage Assistance"  with a sum of Rs.10,000/- for both male and female is given as Marriage Assistance to employees or their Son/Daughter who legally attain the age of marriage.
schemeContent.benefits_md: A sum of Rs.10,000/- for both male and female is given as Marriage Assistance to employees or their Son/Daughter who legally attain the age of marriage.
schemeContent.briefDescription: The Government of Tamil Nadu introduced "Marriage Assistance"  for the employees or their Son/Daughter who legally attain the age of marriage.

applicationProcess.process_md:
Applicants who require the [application form](https://www.lwb.tn.gov.in/forms/Marriage_assistance.pdf) in person or self-addressed Rs.- Postage It can be obtained through the enclosed envelope.
Address to apply.- Secretary, Tamil Nadu Professional Welfare Board, PO Box No. 718, T.M.S. Campus, Thenampet, Chennai-600 006.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md:
1. Should have contributed to Labour Welfare Fund.
1. Employee’s monthly salary not exceeding Rs.25,000/- (Basic pay + DA).
